purpose: Research-only visual grammar for ReteaRn UK. No third-party images are redistributed.
patterns: consumer inserting a PET bottle or metal can into a return point
UK retail entrance or checkout-adjacent return area
retailer readiness timeline and decision tree
prohibited: Irish Re-turn branding as UK DRS
glass in Exchange for Change scheme visuals unless Wales is explicitly separated
third-party logos, retailer trade dress and branded packaging
copied social post layouts, campaign artwork or platform templates
external image URLs without documented permission
copyrightPolicy: Research patterns only. No search-result images, competitor artwork, platform posts or stock assets are copied, embedded or redistributed.
